description: Returned by run-mining-campaign skill. Summary of a NotebookLM extraction run.

notebook_name.description: Target NLM notebook name or ID

extraction_method.description: Which extraction path was used. mind_map_json is preferred.

raw_output_path.description: Absolute path to the raw output file written to src/content/_raw_nlm/

maker_checker_passed.description: Confirms Maker output passed Pydantic schema validation

retry_count.description: Number of Maker re-prompts required (0 is ideal)

validation_note: maker_checker_passed must be true before passing output to AST injector.
